## Summary

Fixes P1 readability defect across four admin pages where `text-gray-400`/`text-gray-500` on white backgrounds made data nearly invisible for operators scanning dashboards.

**Standard applied** (per user directive):
- `text-slate-900`/`text-slate-800` primary text, `text-slate-700` secondary
- `text-blue-700` for job ID links, `text-red-800` for error badges
- `bg-slate-100` table headers with `font-bold text-slate-900`
- Status badges get `ring-1 ring-*-200` for visible borders
- Error messages get strongest contrast: `text-red-800` on `bg-red-50` with `ring-1 ring-red-200`
- No cream/yellow/light text on admin data pages

**Pages fixed:**
- `/admin/jobs/dead-letter` — full rewrite matching exact styling standard
- `/admin/diagnostics` — MetricCard colors, phase timing table, recent failures feed
- `/admin/jobs` — table headers, status badges, error display
- `/admin/pipeline-health` — SIPOC strip labels, heatmap table, recent jobs, diagnostics status, legend section

**Pages NOT changed** (already use intentional dark `rg-ink`/`rg-cream` theme with adequate contrast):
- `/admin` (main), `/admin/experience`, `/admin/support`, `/admin/costs/*`, `/admin/analytics/*`

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/d4851c426d7b4c5eb439461fb11cc120
